infra_needs.summary: Honeypot simulation oracle (policy-rpc sidecar): forks current chain state and simulates a buy-then-sell round-trip on tokenOut through the swap router to measure sellability, effective sell tax, sell-revert, and owner-modifiable-tax / owner-blacklist flags. Proven & live in GoPlus Token Security and Honeypot.is; ScopeBall's novelty is wiring it to the pre-sign swap gate. Reuses ScopeBall's existing per-chain router registry for the router address.
infra_needs.new_method: honeypot.sim(chain_id, owner, token, router) -> { canBuy, canSell, sellReverts, sellTaxRatio, taxModifiable, ownerCanBlacklist }
infra_needs.supersedes_fixture: swap-out-token-honeypot-warn (UNI-05) — coarse classification-registry WARN; this upgrades to an active sell-simulation FAIL
